description: This Java source file defines the MailjetEmailProvider class, which implements the EmailProvider interface to send emails via Mailjet's Send API v3.1. It handles constructing the email payload, authorization, and sending HTTP requests, with error handling and logging.

classes.name: MailjetEmailProvider
classes.description: Implementation of EmailProvider interface for sending emails via Mailjet API, encapsulating HTTP request construction, authentication, and error handling.

methods.name: MailjetEmailProvider
methods.description: Constructor initializing NotificationProperties, ObjectMapper, and optionally HttpClient.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Method to send an email via Mailjet API with specified recipient, subject, and body, including error handling and logging.
